zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cowbron於1542年出生在英國藍卡爾洛福頓時，她的父親John Cowbaine22歲，母親Elizabeth Thornton23歲。她於1561年5月11日與Henry Robinson在英國英格蘭藍卡爾吉可哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1586年3月在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆享年44歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Cowbron于1542年出生在英国藍卡爾洛福頓时，她的父亲John Cowbaine22岁，母亲Elizabeth Thornton23岁。她于1561年5月11日与Henry Robinson在英国英格兰藍卡爾吉可哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1586年3月在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆享年44岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cowbron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Colbran
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Colbrand (Old Scandinavian Kolbrandr, Kolbrand).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cowbron was born in 1542, in Lowton, Lancashire, England, her father, John Cowbaine, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Thornton, was 23. She married Henry Robinson on 11 May 1561, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in March 1586, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Cowbron est née en 1542, à Lowton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Cowbaine, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Thornton, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Robinson le 11 mai 1561, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1586, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Cowbron 1542 in Lowton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cowbaine 22 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Thornton 23. Sie hat am 11. Mai 1561 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Henry Robinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1586 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Kirkham, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Henry Robinson il 11 maggio 1561, nel Kirkham, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cowbronが1542年にイギリスランカシュアイアロウトンで生まれた時，父John Cowbaineは22歳，母Elizabeth Thorntonは23歳であった。1561年5月11日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムでHenry Robinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1586年3月にイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムで44歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cowbron(이)가 1542년 영국 랭카실르 로턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cowbaine(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Thornton(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1561년 5월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 커크함에서 Henry Robinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1586년 3월 영국 랭카실르 커크함에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Henry Robinson em 11 de maio de 1561, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cowbron родилась в 1542 г. в местности лоутон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Cowbaine было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Thornton, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Robinson 11 мая 1561 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла марта 1586 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности ланкашир, Англия.
